items.example: There's too much traffic on the roads at this time.
There are too many people in this lift, let's wait.
We don't have enough money to buy a house yet.
There's not enough time to finish the project today.
This restaurant is too expensive for students.
Your English is good enough for the job.
She's too young to vote, she's only 16.
Can you run fast enough to catch the bus?
